title: Navigation & Loading Consistency
description: Fix missing NavBar on JobBoard, add Job Board to nav links, fix AuthLayout brand link, replace all spinner-based loading states with shimmer skeletons, fix broken OnboardingChecklist extension link, and add missing meta tags to PublicTimeline.

userStories.title: Add NavBar to JobBoard page
userStories.description: JobBoard.jsx renders a bare <main> with no navigation bar, making it impossible to navigate away without the browser back button. Wrap the page in a flex column div, add <NavBar /> at the top, and change the root element from <main> to a <div> wrapper with <main> inside for the content.
acceptanceCriteria: JobBoard.jsx imports NavBar from ../components/NavBar
NavBar renders at the top of the JobBoard page
The page root is a <div className='flex min-h-screen flex-col bg-background'> wrapping NavBar and a <main> for content
All existing layout classes (gap-6, px-4, py-8, sm:px-6) remain on the content <main>
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add Job Board to NavBar navigation links
userStories.description: NavBar.jsx's NAV_LINKS array does not include the /jobs route, so users have no way to navigate to the Job Board from the nav. Add a Job Board entry using the Briefcase icon from lucide-react.
acceptanceCriteria: NavBar.jsx imports Briefcase from lucide-react/dist/esm/icons/briefcase
NAV_LINKS includes { to: '/jobs', label: 'Job Board', Icon: Briefcase } positioned after Dashboard (index 1 or wherever makes sense between Dashboard and Calendar)
The link renders correctly in both desktop sidebar and mobile nav
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Make Pipelined brand text a home link in AuthLayout
userStories.description:
AuthLayout.jsx renders the brand name 'Pipelined' as a plain

tag. It should be a from react-router-dom so users on login/register pages can click back to the landing page.
acceptanceCriteria: AuthLayout.jsx imports Link from react-router-dom
The 'Pipelined' brand text is wrapped in <Link to='/'>
The link has no underline and preserves the existing font-display font-semibold text-xl text-foreground styling
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Replace PublicTimeline spinner with shimmer skeleton
userStories.description: PublicTimeline.jsx LoadingState uses a spinning border div. Replace it with a shimmer skeleton that matches the page layout: a header area and several timeline entry rows.
acceptanceCriteria: LoadingState in PublicTimeline.jsx no longer uses animate-spin
LoadingState renders shimmer-bg animate-shimmer skeleton elements: a header block and at least 4 timeline row skeletons
The skeleton is wrapped in a max-w container matching the page's content width
aria-hidden='true' is set on the skeleton wrapper
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Replace OfferComparison spinner with shimmer skeleton
userStories.description: OfferComparison.jsx LoadingState uses an animate-spin spinner. Replace it with a shimmer skeleton showing card placeholders that match the page's offer card layout.
acceptanceCriteria: LoadingState in OfferComparison.jsx no longer uses animate-spin
LoadingState renders shimmer-bg animate-shimmer skeleton: NavBar at top, then 2-3 offer card skeletons in the page layout area
Each card skeleton has a header row and several content rows
aria-hidden='true' is set on the skeleton content area
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Replace GoalProgress animate-pulse with shimmer skeleton
userStories.description: GoalProgress.jsx uses animate-pulse on its loading skeleton. Replace with the project-standard shimmer-bg animate-shimmer classes.
acceptanceCriteria: GoalProgress.jsx loading skeleton uses shimmer-bg animate-shimmer instead of animate-pulse bg-muted
The circular ring placeholder and text placeholders all use the shimmer classes
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Fix OnboardingChecklist broken extension install link
userStories.description: OnboardingChecklist.jsx has EXTENSION_STEP_HREF = '#install-extension' which is a broken anchor — no element with that id exists. Replace with the Chrome Web Store URL for the extension.
acceptanceCriteria: EXTENSION_STEP_HREF in OnboardingChecklist.jsx is set to 'https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/pipelined' or similar reasonable placeholder Chrome Web Store URL
The link opens in a new tab (target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer')
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add og:description and meta description to PublicTimeline
userStories.description: PublicTimeline.jsx useEffect updates og:title but never sets the meta description or og:description. Add these updates following the same pattern used in PublicPipeline.jsx.
acceptanceCriteria: PublicTimeline.jsx useEffect sets document querySelector 'meta[name=description]' content to a relevant description when timeline data loads
useEffect sets querySelector 'meta[property=og:description]' content to the same description
On cleanup the meta tags are reset to their default values
Build passes with no errors
